# 1ai-Skills
# 213 Open-Source AI Agent Skills with Self-Improving Meta-Skills
# https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills

## What This Is
1ai-Skills is the world's largest open-source AI agent skill ecosystem. 213 production-ready skills across 16 categories that enable AI agents to auto-evolve, auto-learn, and auto-improve. Each skill embeds expertise from world-class practitioners (Buffett, Musk, Vaynerchuk) translated into actionable AI-executable frameworks.

## Installation
```bash
npx skills add oyi77/1ai-skills
```
Or clone: `git clone https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills.git`

## Self-Improving Agent System (v2.0)
9 meta-skills creating a self-improving agent operating system:
- meta/performance-monitor: Track execution metrics (latency, success rates, cost)
- meta/feedback-collector: Multi-channel feedback aggregation
- meta/self-assessment: Skills evaluate their own capabilities
- meta/improvement-generator: Create prioritized improvement plans
- meta/skill-evolution: Version control for skills with rollback
- meta/auto-learner: Autonomous learning from execution data
- meta/pattern-recognition: Identify success and failure patterns
- meta/meta-orchestrator: Coordinate the self-improvement loop
- meta/data: Centralized SQLite storage for all meta-operations

## All Categories (213 skills total)
- research/ (25): McKinsey analysis, deep research, Polymarket analyst, continuous learning, Sherlock deduction
- core/ (24): Self-improvement, memory systems, AI orchestration, session brain, hub memory
- content/ (22): Video generation, AI podcast, faceless YouTube, humanizer, Seedance, content generator
- marketing/ (21): SEO optimizer, viral marketing, growth engine, Twitter automation, email marketing
- automation/ (21): n8n workflows, WhatsApp/Telegram/Twitter bots, job hunter, scrapers, content publisher
- development/ (17): TDD, systematic debugging, code review, PRD generator, git worktrees, brainstorming
- agents/ (14): Research, review, planning, code, deploy, refactor, linter, security, perf agents
- integrations/ (11): Slack, Discord, Notion, GitHub bots, webhooks, and API integrations
- operations/ (10): Finance ops, revenue team, project management, payment invoicing, governance
- mcp/ (10): MCP servers for Slack, GitHub, Notion, Stripe, Supabase, Linear
- meta/ (9): Performance monitor, auto-learner, skill evolution, pattern recognition, orchestrator
- sales/ (6): High-ticket closing, lead generation, business development, customer support
- devops/ (6): Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, GitLab CI
- trading/ (7): Black Edge, AlphaEar, Polymarket, Tushare, crypto trading bot
- productivity/ (6): Google Workspace, calendar, email automation, Notion
- data/ (4): Data cleaning, anomaly detection, report generation, visualization

## Featured Capabilities
- Self-improving AI agents that evolve from execution data
- Black Edge trading intelligence (satellite imagery, dark pools, options flow)
- Full-stack SEO with GEO optimization for AI Overviews
- Automated marketing across Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn
- Production DevOps with Docker, K8s, and CI/CD pipelines
- MCP server integration for Slack, GitHub, Notion, Stripe
